topic: whether a conflict-bearing review packet may be carried into a later human-owned decision context without overstating approval or registry readiness
distilled_summary: the packet has crossed out of mere design hygiene because a real carry-forward choice must be made, but it still does not justify human registry review
open_conflicts: participants disagree on whether the unresolved conflict should remain held locally or be exposed to a later bounded human decision posture
distillator_notes: Escalate only to bounded human decision context; do not reframe this as registry review.
